title: Hoe turns into a pickaxe
description: This modification adds several new crafting recipes, thanks to which you can turn a hoe into a pickaxe
body:
## 📜 Description

 **This modification adds several new crafting recipes, thanks to which you can turn a hoe into a pickaxe.**

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**
 
 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**

- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**

## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
